title: verbascum × decalvans
intro: Verbascum × decalvans, also known as the common mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Verbascum × decalvans include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular natural remedy in many cultures. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal medicine through various methods, including infusion, decoction, and topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed effectively.
